tasks.description: Phase M6 Integration Test (Метрика 3): искусственно ввести bug в whilly/cli.py (через monkeypatch), запустить Whilly → проверить что: issue создан + fix-MR появился + после mock green CI план возобновлён через resume. Anti-recursion: 3-я попытка → fail-fast. DONE: реализовано на ветке whilly/workspace/git-integration-pr-release-automation-in-prd-wiz. Дизайнерское решение — compositional integration test через layered fakes, где single FakeProvider / real StateStore (на disk против tmp_path) / FakeRunner (agent_runner.run_agent) / StubUpgrader / StubRunPlanRunner thread'аются через все 4 стадии self-heal pipeline'а одного scenario. Цель M6 — пин cross-stage handoffs (issue→dispatch, dispatch→poll, poll→merge, merge→resume), которые слипают мимо per-stage suites потому что unit tests stub предыдущую стадию's output. Не reuse subprocess-driven main() entry point (как M5/test_headless_exit_codes делает) потому что full pipeline не собран из cli.run_plan на этом этапе — TASK-019/020 живут как standalone helpers, integrating их в run_plan = work for separate tasks. Compositional drive через прямые вызовы всех 4 public entry points (handle_internal_exception → poll_for_fix_mr → wait_for_fix_mr_ci_and_merge → upgrade_and_resume_after_fix) точно матчит как cli would orchestrate в production, давая M6 ту же сценарную coverage без зависимости от unwritten plumbing. Новый файл tests/test_m6_integration.py: 9 тестов через 4 класса (TestFullSelfHealPipeline 2, TestAntiRecursion 2, TestRedCiRefusesMerge 2, TestStageHandoff 3). Module-level pytestmark = [pytest.mark.integration, pytest.mark.slow] — обе marker apply, integration лет CI run all M-suites together, slow — policy 'opt-in via -m slow' so fast pre-commit loop excludes pipeline composition tests даже при том что injected clocks make it fast. Marker 'slow' зарегистрирован новой строкой в pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options] markers рядом с 'integration' (TASK-005) — pytest --strict-markers не warn'ит. FakeProvider композитный — exposes issue_create / pr_list / pr_status_ci / pr_merge с canned response queues (последний sticks для long polling) + cross-call accounting для inter-stage assertions ('merge call carried mr_number from polling stage'). FakeRunner records prompts (drop-in для agent_runner.run_agent — сigna duck-typed result_text/exit_code/is_complete). StubUpgrader records calls + returns canned UpgradeResult(ok=True, strategy='pip'). StubRunPlanRunner records resume invocation kwargs (plan_file/agent_name/resume/state_store_present). _build_internal_exc через runpy.run_path с file под pkg/ — synthetic-traceback trick mirroring per-stage suites, deepest frame's co_filename points под pkg так handler's path filter classifies как DETECTED. _seed_resumable_state pre-populates StateStore.save с iteration=4/cost=0.42/task_status так чтобы upgrade_and_resume_after_fix.load() finds matching plan_file и не fail'ит на NO_STATE. _make_clock helper mirrors per-stage suite idiom (yields values in order, final sticks). Покрыты: TestFullSelfHealPipeline.test_full_pipeline_happy_path — все 4 стадии composeят: handler files issue (issue_calls==1 + report.issue_url/issue_number set + counter persisted к 1) → poll_for_fix_mr finds matching MR (default fake returns 'fix:'-titled summary → poll.mr_number==42, poll.mr_head=='fix/self-heal-runtime-error') → wait_for_fix_mr_ci_and_merge merges (merge_calls==1, merge.number==42 carrying number из polling stage) → upgrade_and_resume_after_fix succeeds (upgrader.calls==1, runner.calls[0].plan_file matches seed, resume=True, counter reset к 0). Audit trail invariant: events file contains all 8 terminal verbs (DETECTED→ISSUE_CREATED→DISPATCH→MR_FOUND→CI_GREEN→CI_MERGED→UPGRADE_SUCCEEDED→RESUMED) AND ordering check ensures stages fired в correct sequence (regression that swapped order would imply stage executed before prerequisite). test_full_pipeline_pending_then_green_polls_until_success — provider.status_results queue [PENDING, PENDING, SUCCESS] forces 3 polls before merge — pins polling cadence really runs through deterministic clock. TestAntiRecursion.test_third_attempt_emits_exhausted_no_dispatch — 3 sequential handle_internal_exception calls (each crash под its own pkg/crashN/broken.py file потому что runpy не reuses compiled code object для overwritten path), counter progression 1→2→3, EXHAUSTED event на третьем с attempts==3+max_attempts==DEFAULT_MAX_SELF_HEAL_ATTEMPTS (=2), runner.calls==2 (третий отказ), DISPATCH events==2, store.get_self_heal_attempts()==3 (на disk verified). TestAntiRecursion.test_successful_resume_resets_counter_for_next_run — pre-populated counter=1 + successful upgrade_and_resume_after_fix → counter==0 (cleanup invariant — operator running Whilly second time не inherit'ит leftover budget). TestRedCiRefusesMerge.test_ci_failure_blocks_merge — provider.status_results=[FAILURE+failed_checks=['unit-tests','lint']] → result.ok=False+OUTCOME_CI_FAILURE+failed_checks propagated, **provider.merge_calls==[]** (load-bearing PRD broken-fix mitigation — regression where merge slipped through despite red CI surfaces here), event sequence has CI_RED но никакого CI_MERGED/CI_GREEN. test_red_ci_does_not_proceed_to_resume — pins composition rule: caller code (cli.run_plan eventually) must guard `if ci_result.ok:` before calling resume. Test simulates intended caller logic (`if ci_result.ok: upgrade_and_resume_after_fix(...)`), then asserts upgrader.calls==[] + run_plan_runner.calls==[] + provider.merge_calls==[]. Без compositional rule в M6, regression where someone wired resume to fire unconditionally would slip past per-stage suites. TestStageHandoff.test_handler_dispatch_then_poller_finds_matching_mr — pins prefix invariant: prompt template (in _build_fix_agent_prompt) advertises 'fix:' AND polling default DEFAULT_FIX_MR_TITLE_PREFIX=='fix:'. Test asserts both: prompt contains 'fix:' lowercase, AND poll.mr_title.lower().startswith('fix:'). Drift between them = poller misses every legitimate fix. test_merge_result_carries_mr_number_to_resume_stage — operators correlate 'we merged PR #42' with 'we resumed plan X' via mr_number join key — regression dropping number breaks audit trail traceability. test_pipeline_short_circuits_when_self_heal_disabled — config(SELF_HEAL=False) → all 4 stages collapse to no-ops: handler returns DISABLED + provider.issue_calls==[]+runner.calls==[], poller skips silently + provider.list_calls==[], merge stage skips silently + provider.status_calls==[]+merge_calls==[], resume stage skips silently + upgrader.calls==[]+run_plan_runner.calls==[]. AND aggregate audit invariant: events file completely empty (no DISABLED noise) — proves silent-skip property composes. Time control: sleep injected как lambda _: None, monotonic injected как _make_clock([0.0, 1.0, 2.0]) tickers — все polling loops finish в microseconds (full suite runs в 0.04-0.07s).
